security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.anthropic.com http://localhost:11434 http://127.0.0.1:11434; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none';

bundle.longDescription: Manor is a local-first personal assistant for your household — tasks, ledger, recipes, maintenance, repair notes — with an optional chat companion that runs on-device via Ollama or against Anthropic's API.
